changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
NO NEW DE-ESCALATION SIGNALS this cycle.

Existing de-escalation: Israel-Lebanon direct talks still planned (Kushner/Dermer). Guterres ceasefire call. BUT: no progress reported, Israel says campaign will 'intensify.'

ESCALATION: (1) Khamenei confirmed dead, Mojtaba succeeds — regime rallying around martyrdom narrative, not collapsing. Succession may mean prolonged war, not quick resolution. (2) Doha evacuation — Qatar now in danger zone, last neutral Gulf state impacted. (3) NATO intercepts 4th+ missile over Turkey — cumulative provocations pushing Turkey toward confrontation. (4) Trump warns 'more troops may die' — signals readiness for protracted conflict. (5) Coalition fracturing — China/UK refuse Hormuz coalition. (6) Pakistan-Kandahar — drone-for-airstrike cycle deepening.

IRAN 100 IMMINENT (capped). PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN 99 IMMINENT (capped). ISRAEL-LEBANON 89 IMMINENT. RUSSIA-UKRAINE 82 IMMINENT. RUSSIA 77 IMMINENT. TURKEY 78 IMMINENT. DPRK 47 CRITICAL. SEVEN IMMINENT, ONE CRITICAL, ONE ELEVATED.

latest_news.headline: NATO intercepts Iranian ballistic missile over Turkey — 4th+ intercept
latest_news.text: Iranian ballistic missile fired from Iran passed through Syrian and Iraqi airspace into Turkish airspace before being destroyed by NATO air and missile defense systems in the eastern Mediterranean. Turkey demands clarification from Iran. At least 4th intercept.

latest_news.headline: Parts of Doha (Qatar) evacuated amid Iran missile threat
latest_news.text: Parts of Qatar's capital Doha have been evacuated as Iran's missile and drone campaign expands to previously unhit Gulf states. Qatar had attempted to maintain neutrality as mediator.

latest_news.headline: Mojtaba Khamenei confirmed as new Iran Supreme Leader
latest_news.text: Mojtaba Khamenei, son of slain Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, formally confirmed as new Supreme Leader by Iranian state media. Regime rallying around Shia martyrdom narrative. Quds Day rallies in Tehran with new leadership marching.

latest_news.headline: Trump warns 'more American troops may die' in Iran conflict
latest_news.text: President Trump warned that more US service members may die as combat operations continue 'in full force.' At least 3 US troops already confirmed dead. Signals acceptance of protracted conflict with mounting casualties.

latest_news.headline: Fresh missile attack on UAE Sunday morning — residents told shelter in place
latest_news.text: UAE authorities urged residents to stay in safe places as a fresh missile attack struck Sunday morning. Iran continues targeting Gulf states.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan strikes Kandahar military facility after Taliban drone attacks
latest_news.text: Pakistan launched airstrikes on a Kandahar military facility after Taliban drones struck Pakistani territory. Third cross-border strike this week. Drone-for-airstrike tit-for-tat escalating.

latest_news.headline: Five US refueling tankers destroyed at Prince Salman Air Base
latest_news.text: Five US KC-135 refueling tankers struck and destroyed on the ground. Major blow to US aerial logistics in the Gulf theater.

latest_news.headline: Israel completes 400 waves of strikes on Iran
latest_news.text: Israel killed two more senior Iranian officials, completing 400 waves of airstrikes since the war began. Systematic degradation of Iranian command structure continues.

outlook:
CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability 85% IMMINENT (Day 16 08:04). ESCALATION ACROSS MULTIPLE FRONTS:

(1) IRAN → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): Khamenei confirmed dead, Mojtaba succeeds — regime rallying around martyrdom, not collapsing. Fresh UAE missile attack Sunday. Doha partially evacuated. Trump warns more troops may die. Coalition fracturing (China/UK refuse Hormuz). 400+ waves of strikes completed.

(2) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN → IMMINENT 99 (capped, RISING): Pakistan strikes Kandahar — third cross-border strike this week. Drone-for-airstrike cycle deepening. China-Turkey mediation failing.

(3) ISRAEL-LEBANON → IMMINENT 89 (stable): Direct talks being arranged. Guterres ceasefire call. Israel says campaign will 'intensify.'

(4) RUSSIA-UKRAINE → IMMINENT 82 (rising): Continued bombardment. EU condemns Trump sanctions waiver. No peace talks.

(5) TURKEY → IMMINENT 78 (rising): NATO intercepts 4th+ Iranian missile over Turkey. Turkey demands clarification from Iran. Cumulative provocations mounting.

(6) RUSSIA → IMMINENT 77 (rising). (7) DPRK → CRITICAL 47 (stable).

SEVEN IMMINENT, ONE CRITICAL, ONE ELEVATED. No new zones auto-created.

WATCH NEXT: (1) Mojtaba succession — does new Supreme Leader escalate or seek off-ramp? (2) Doha — will Qatar join evacuation/refugee crisis or broker deal? (3) Turkey — 4th missile intercept approaching threshold for Turkish military response. (4) US troop casualties — mounting deaths testing domestic support. (5) Hormuz coalition — China/UK refusal may collapse Trump's naval effort.
